total_mrr.sql:
WITH monthly AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(date_trunc('month', period_month) AS date) AS period_month,
    SUM(COALESCE(mrr_total, 0)) AS total_mrr,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN customer_id END) AS customer_count
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
  GROUP BY 1
), latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS latest_month
  FROM monthly
)
SELECT
  period_month,
  total_mrr,
  customer_count
FROM monthly
WHERE period_month = (SELECT latest_month FROM latest)
LIMIT 1;

mrr_overview.sql:
WITH monthly AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(date_trunc('month', period_month) AS date) AS period_month,
    SUM(COALESCE(mrr_total, 0)) AS total_mrr,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN customer_id END) AS customer_count
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
  GROUP BY 1
), latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS latest_month
  FROM monthly
), recent AS (
  SELECT period_month, total_mrr, customer_count
  FROM monthly
  WHERE period_month >= date_add('month', -11, (SELECT latest_month FROM latest))
), ytd AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(total_mrr) AS ytd_total_mrr,
    AVG(total_mrr) AS ytd_avg_mrr,
    COUNT(*) AS ytd_months
  FROM monthly
  WHERE year(period_month) = year((SELECT latest_month FROM latest))
), latest_row AS (
  SELECT total_mrr, customer_count, period_month
  FROM monthly
  WHERE period_month = (SELECT latest_month FROM latest)
)
SELECT
  CAST(MAX(l.latest_month) AS DATE) AS period_month,
  MAX(lr.total_mrr) AS latest_total_mrr,
  MAX(lr.customer_count) AS latest_active_accounts,
  MAX(ytd.ytd_total_mrr) AS ytd_total_mrr,
  MAX(ytd.ytd_avg_mrr) AS ytd_avg_mrr,
  MAX(ytd.ytd_months) AS ytd_months,
  SUM(r.total_mrr) AS ttm_total_mrr,
  AVG(r.total_mrr) AS ttm_avg_mrr,
  COUNT(*) AS ttm_months
FROM latest l
CROSS JOIN latest_row lr
CROSS JOIN ytd
CROSS JOIN recent r
LIMIT 1;

mrr_trend_12m.sql:
WITH monthly AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(date_trunc('month', period_month) AS date) AS period_month,
    SUM(COALESCE(mrr_total, 0)) AS total_mrr,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN customer_id END) AS customer_count
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
  GROUP BY 1
), latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS latest_month
  FROM monthly
)
SELECT
  period_month,
  total_mrr,
  customer_count
FROM monthly
WHERE period_month >= date_add('month', -11, (SELECT latest_month FROM latest))
ORDER BY period_month
LIMIT 12;

mrr_trend_range.sql:
WITH monthly AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(date_trunc('month', period_month) AS date) AS period_month,
    SUM(COALESCE(mrr_total, 0)) AS total_mrr,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN customer_id END) AS customer_count
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
  GROUP BY 1
), latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS latest_month
  FROM monthly
), bounds AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN DATE ${start_month} > (SELECT latest_month FROM latest) THEN (SELECT latest_month FROM latest)
      ELSE DATE ${start_month}
    END AS start_month,
    CASE
      WHEN DATE ${end_month} > (SELECT latest_month FROM latest) THEN (SELECT latest_month FROM latest)
      ELSE DATE ${end_month}
    END AS end_month
)
SELECT
  period_month,
  total_mrr,
  customer_count,
  CASE WHEN customer_count > 0 THEN total_mrr / customer_count ELSE NULL END AS arpu
FROM monthly
WHERE period_month BETWEEN (SELECT start_month FROM bounds) AND (SELECT end_month FROM bounds)
ORDER BY period_month
LIMIT 60;

mrr_by_month.sql:
SELECT
  period_month,
  SUM(revenue_total) AS total_revenue,
  COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS customers,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 0 THEN SUM(revenue_total) / COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) ELSE NULL END AS arpu
FROM curated_core.v_monthly_revenue_platt_long
WHERE period_month = DATE ${target_month}
GROUP BY period_month
LIMIT 1;

forecast_ap_spend.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(business_date, TRY(date_parse(entry_date, '%m/%d/%Y'))) AS entry_dt,
    account_category,
    TRY_CAST(amount AS double) AS amount
  FROM curated_core.intacct_gl_entries_current_ssot
  WHERE business_date IS NOT NULL OR entry_date IS NOT NULL
), windowed AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM base
  WHERE entry_dt IS NOT NULL
    AND entry_dt >= DATE ${start_date}
    AND entry_dt < date_add('month', 1, date_trunc('month', DATE ${end_date}))
)
SELECT
  date_format(date_trunc('month', entry_dt), '%Y-%m') AS period_month,
  SUM(amount) AS amount_total
FROM windowed
WHERE account_category LIKE 'Accounts Payable%'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

forecast_revenue.sql:
SELECT
  date_format(period_month, '%Y-%m') AS period_month,
  SUM(revenue_total) AS total_revenue
FROM curated_core.v_monthly_revenue_platt_long
WHERE period_month >= DATE ${start_date}
  AND period_month < date_add('month', 1, date_trunc('month', DATE ${end_date}))
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

forecast_vendor_spend.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(business_date, TRY(date_parse(entry_date, '%m/%d/%Y'))) AS entry_dt,
    account_category,
    vendor_name_dim,
    vendorname,
    vendorid,
    TRY_CAST(amount AS double) AS amount
  FROM curated_core.intacct_gl_entries_current_ssot
  WHERE business_date IS NOT NULL OR entry_date IS NOT NULL
), windowed AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM base
  WHERE entry_dt IS NOT NULL
    AND entry_dt >= DATE ${start_date}
    AND entry_dt < date_add('month', 1, date_trunc('month', DATE ${end_date}))
), ranked AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(NULLIF(vendor_name_dim, ''), NULLIF(vendorname, ''), NULLIF(vendorid, ''), 'Unknown') AS vendor,
    SUM(ABS(amount)) AS total_abs
  FROM windowed
  GROUP BY 1
  ORDER BY total_abs DESC
  LIMIT 10
), monthly AS (
  SELECT
    date_format(date_trunc('month', entry_dt), '%Y-%m') AS period_month,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(vendor_name_dim, ''), NULLIF(vendorname, ''), NULLIF(vendorid, ''), 'Unknown') AS vendor,
    SUM(amount) AS amount_total
  FROM windowed
  WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(vendor_name_dim, ''), NULLIF(vendorname, ''), NULLIF(vendorid, ''), 'Unknown') IN (SELECT vendor FROM ranked)
  GROUP BY 1,2
)
SELECT period_month, vendor, amount_total
FROM monthly
ORDER BY period_month, vendor;

forecast_gl_account.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(business_date, TRY(date_parse(entry_date, '%m/%d/%Y'))) AS entry_dt,
    accountno,
    account_title,
    TRY_CAST(amount AS double) AS amount
  FROM curated_core.intacct_gl_entries_current_ssot
  WHERE business_date IS NOT NULL OR entry_date IS NOT NULL
), windowed AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM base
  WHERE entry_dt IS NOT NULL
    AND entry_dt >= DATE ${start_date}
    AND entry_dt < date_add('month', 1, date_trunc('month', DATE ${end_date}))
), ranked AS (
  SELECT accountno, account_title, SUM(ABS(amount)) AS total_abs
  FROM windowed
  WHERE accountno IS NOT NULL AND account_title IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1,2
  ORDER BY total_abs DESC
  LIMIT 15
)
SELECT
  date_format(date_trunc('month', w.entry_dt), '%Y-%m') AS period_month,
  w.accountno,
  w.account_title,
  SUM(w.amount) AS amount_total
FROM windowed w
JOIN ranked r
  ON w.accountno = r.accountno AND w.account_title = r.account_title
GROUP BY 1,2,3
ORDER BY period_month, accountno;

forecast_cash_flow.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(business_date, TRY(date_parse(entry_date, '%m/%d/%Y'))) AS entry_dt,
    account_category,
    TRY_CAST(amount AS double) AS amount
  FROM curated_core.intacct_gl_entries_current_ssot
  WHERE business_date IS NOT NULL OR entry_date IS NOT NULL
), windowed AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM base
  WHERE entry_dt IS NOT NULL
    AND entry_dt >= DATE ${start_date}
    AND entry_dt < date_add('month', 1, date_trunc('month', DATE ${end_date}))
)
SELECT
  date_format(date_trunc('month', entry_dt), '%Y-%m') AS period_month,
  SUM(CASE WHEN account_category LIKE 'Revenue%' OR account_category LIKE '%Revenue' OR account_category = 'Sales Returns and Discounts' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS revenue,
  SUM(CASE WHEN account_category LIKE 'Revenue%' OR account_category LIKE '%Revenue' OR account_category = 'Sales Returns and Discounts' THEN 0 ELSE ABS(amount) END) AS expenses,
  SUM(CASE WHEN account_category LIKE 'Revenue%' OR account_category LIKE '%Revenue' OR account_category = 'Sales Returns and Discounts' THEN amount ELSE 0 END)
    - SUM(CASE WHEN account_category LIKE 'Revenue%' OR account_category LIKE '%Revenue' OR account_category = 'Sales Returns and Discounts' THEN 0 ELSE ABS(amount) END) AS cash_flow
FROM windowed
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

forecast_expense_category.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(business_date, TRY(date_parse(entry_date, '%m/%d/%Y'))) AS entry_dt,
    account_category,
    TRY_CAST(amount AS double) AS amount
  FROM curated_core.intacct_gl_entries_current_ssot
  WHERE business_date IS NOT NULL OR entry_date IS NOT NULL
), windowed AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM base
  WHERE entry_dt IS NOT NULL
    AND entry_dt >= DATE ${start_date}
    AND entry_dt < date_add('month', 1, date_trunc('month', DATE ${end_date}))
)
SELECT
  date_format(date_trunc('month', entry_dt), '%Y-%m') AS period_month,
  account_category,
  SUM(amount) AS amount_total
FROM windowed
WHERE account_category IS NOT NULL
  AND NOT (account_category LIKE 'Revenue%' OR account_category LIKE '%Revenue' OR account_category = 'Sales Returns and Discounts')
GROUP BY 1,2
ORDER BY 1,2;

customer_count.sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS total_customers,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN has_active_service = true THEN customer_id END) AS active_customers,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN has_active_service = false THEN customer_id END) AS inactive_customers
FROM curated_core.dim_customer_platt_v1_1
WHERE (is_test_internal = false OR is_test_internal IS NULL)
LIMIT 1;

billing_customers_latest.sql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS period_month
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
)
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(m.mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN m.customer_id END) AS billing_customers,
  MAX(l.period_month) AS period_month
FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt m
CROSS JOIN latest l
WHERE m.period_month = l.period_month
LIMIT 1;

arpu_overview.sql:
WITH monthly AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(date_trunc('month', period_month) AS date) AS period_month,
    SUM(COALESCE(mrr_total, 0)) AS total_mrr,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN customer_id END) AS customer_count
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
  GROUP BY 1
), latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS latest_month
  FROM monthly
), latest_row AS (
  SELECT total_mrr, customer_count, period_month
  FROM monthly
  WHERE period_month = (SELECT latest_month FROM latest)
), recent AS (
  SELECT total_mrr, customer_count
  FROM monthly
  WHERE period_month >= date_add('month', -11, (SELECT latest_month FROM latest))
)
SELECT
  CAST(MAX(latest.latest_month) AS DATE) AS period_month,
  CASE
    WHEN MAX(latest_row.customer_count) > 0 THEN MAX(latest_row.total_mrr) / MAX(latest_row.customer_count)
    ELSE NULL
  END AS latest_arpu,
  AVG(CASE WHEN recent.customer_count > 0 THEN recent.total_mrr / recent.customer_count ELSE NULL END) AS ttm_avg_arpu
FROM latest
CROSS JOIN latest_row
CROSS JOIN recent
LIMIT 1;

customer_overview.sql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS period_month
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
), billing AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(m.mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN m.customer_id END) AS active_billing_customers,
    MAX(l.period_month) AS period_month
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt m
  CROSS JOIN latest l
  WHERE m.period_month = l.period_month
), ssot AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN username IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(username) <> '' THEN username END) AS total_customers_ssot,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(active, '')) IN ('y','yes','true','1') AND username IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(username) <> '' THEN username END) AS active_customers_ssot
  FROM curated_core.platt_customer_current_ssot
  WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(sensitive_p, '')) <> 'y'
)
SELECT
  billing.period_month,
  billing.active_billing_customers,
  ssot.total_customers_ssot,
  ssot.active_customers_ssot
FROM billing
CROSS JOIN ssot
LIMIT 1;

customer_identity_overview.sql:
WITH finance AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(period_month AS date) AS period_month,
    CAST(mrr_customers AS bigint) AS billing_customers,
    CAST(active_accounts AS bigint) AS active_service_customers
  FROM curated_core.v_finance_kpis_latest
  LIMIT 1
), modeled AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) AS active_subscriptions
  FROM curated_core.v_network_health
  WHERE dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM curated_core.v_network_health)
), ssot AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN username IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(username) <> '' THEN username END) AS total_ssot_customers,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(active, '')) IN ('y','yes','true','1') AND username IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(username) <> '' THEN username END) AS active_ssot_customers
  FROM curated_core.platt_customer_current_ssot
  WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(sensitive_p, '')) <> 'y'
)
SELECT
  CAST(finance.period_month AS timestamp) AS period_month,
  finance.billing_customers,
  finance.active_service_customers,
  modeled.active_subscriptions,
  ssot.active_ssot_customers,
  ssot.total_ssot_customers
FROM finance
CROSS JOIN modeled
CROSS JOIN ssot
LIMIT 1;

customer_trend_12m.sql:
WITH monthly AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(date_trunc('month', period_month) AS date) AS period_month,
    SUM(COALESCE(mrr_total, 0)) AS total_mrr,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN customer_id END) AS customer_count
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
  GROUP BY 1
), latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS latest_month
  FROM monthly
)
SELECT
  period_month,
  customer_count
FROM monthly
WHERE period_month >= date_add('month', -11, (SELECT latest_month FROM latest))
ORDER BY period_month
LIMIT 12;

tickets_summary.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      TRY(date(from_iso8601_timestamp(created_time))),
      TRY(date(date_parse(created_time, '%Y-%m-%d')))
    ) AS created_date,
    status,
    type,
    work_done,
    operations_code
  FROM curated_core.v_cci_tickets_clean
  WHERE created_time IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(created_time) <> ''
), latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(created_date) AS max_date FROM base
), open_flagged AS (
  SELECT
    created_date,
    CASE
      WHEN status IS NULL OR TRIM(status) = '' THEN true
      WHEN LOWER(status) IN ('closed', 'resolved', 'complete', 'completed', 'done') THEN false
      WHEN LOWER(status) LIKE '%closed%' OR LOWER(status) LIKE '%resolved%' THEN false
      ELSE true
    END AS is_open
  FROM base
  WHERE created_date IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  MAX(latest.max_date) AS latest_ticket_date,
  COUNT(*) AS tickets_total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN created_date >= date_add('day', -30, latest.max_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tickets_last_30d,
  SUM(CASE WHEN created_date >= date_add('day', -90, latest.max_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tickets_last_90d,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS open_tickets_estimate
FROM open_flagged
CROSS JOIN latest
LIMIT 1;

outages_summary.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      TRY(date(from_iso8601_timestamp(created_time))),
      TRY(date(date_parse(created_time, '%Y-%m-%d')))
    ) AS created_date,
    type,
    work_done,
    operations_code
  FROM curated_core.v_cci_tickets_clean
  WHERE created_time IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(created_time) <> ''
), latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(created_date) AS max_date FROM base
), outages AS (
  SELECT created_date
  FROM base
  WHERE created_date IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      LOWER(type) LIKE '%outage%'
      OR LOWER(work_done) LIKE '%outage%'
      OR LOWER(operations_code) LIKE '%outage%'
    )
)
SELECT
  MAX(latest.max_date) AS latest_ticket_date,
  COUNT(*) AS outages_total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN created_date >= date_add('day', -30, latest.max_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outages_last_30d,
  SUM(CASE WHEN created_date >= date_add('day', -90, latest.max_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outages_last_90d
FROM outages
CROSS JOIN latest
LIMIT 1;

finance_kpis_latest.sql:
SELECT
  period_month,
  total_mrr,
  mrr_customers,
  active_accounts,
  churn_rate,
  churned_customers,
  prev_customers
FROM curated_core.v_finance_kpis_latest
LIMIT 1;

platt_billing_mrr_latest.sql:
WITH finance AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(period_month AS date) AS period_month,
    CAST(total_mrr AS double) AS latest_total_mrr,
    CAST(mrr_customers AS bigint) AS latest_billing_customers,
    CAST(active_accounts AS bigint) AS active_customers
  FROM curated_core.v_finance_kpis_latest
  LIMIT 1
), modeled AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) AS active_subscriptions
  FROM curated_core.v_network_health
  WHERE dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM curated_core.v_network_health)
), monthly_totals AS (
  SELECT
    period_month,
    SUM(total_mrr) AS total_mrr
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_and_churn_summary
  GROUP BY 1
), latest_month AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS latest_month
  FROM monthly_totals
), recent AS (
  SELECT period_month, total_mrr
  FROM monthly_totals
  WHERE period_month >= date_add('month', -11, (SELECT latest_month FROM latest_month))
), ttm AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(total_mrr) AS ttm_total_mrr,
    AVG(total_mrr) AS ttm_avg_mrr,
    COUNT(*) AS ttm_months
  FROM recent
), ytd AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(total_mrr) AS ytd_total_mrr,
    COUNT(*) AS ytd_months
  FROM monthly_totals
  WHERE date_trunc('year', period_month) = date_trunc('year', (SELECT latest_month FROM latest_month))
    AND period_month <= (SELECT latest_month FROM latest_month)
)
SELECT
  finance.period_month,
  finance.latest_total_mrr,
  modeled.active_subscriptions,
  finance.active_customers,
  CASE
    WHEN modeled.active_subscriptions > 0 THEN finance.latest_total_mrr / modeled.active_subscriptions
    ELSE NULL
  END AS latest_arpu,
  finance.latest_billing_customers,
  ttm.ttm_total_mrr,
  ttm.ttm_avg_mrr,
  ytd.ytd_total_mrr,
  ytd.ytd_months
FROM finance
CROSS JOIN modeled
CROSS JOIN ttm
CROSS JOIN ytd
LIMIT 1;

platt_billing_mrr_trend_12m.sql:
WITH monthly AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(date_trunc('month', period_month) AS date) AS period_month,
    SUM(COALESCE(mrr_total, 0)) AS total_mrr,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN customer_id END) AS customer_count
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
  GROUP BY 1
), latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS latest_month
  FROM monthly
)
SELECT
  period_month,
  total_mrr,
  customer_count
FROM monthly
WHERE period_month >= date_add('month', -11, (SELECT latest_month FROM latest))
ORDER BY period_month
LIMIT 12;

active_accounts.sql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS period_month
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
)
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(m.mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN m.customer_id END) AS customers_with_mrr,
  MAX(l.period_month) AS period_month
FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt m
CROSS JOIN latest l
WHERE m.period_month = l.period_month
LIMIT 1;

account_movement_6m.sql:
SELECT *
FROM curated_core.v_monthly_account_churn_by_segment
ORDER BY period_month DESC, segment
LIMIT 30;

mrr_summary_12m.sql:
SELECT *
FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_and_churn_summary
ORDER BY period_month DESC
LIMIT 12;

month_end_close.sql:
WITH ordered AS (
  SELECT
    period_month,
    total_mrr,
    customer_count,
    LAG(customer_count) OVER (ORDER BY period_month) AS prev_customer_count
  FROM curated_core.mrr_monthly_rollup
), latest AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM ordered
  WHERE period_month = (SELECT MAX(period_month) FROM ordered)
)
SELECT
  period_month,
  total_mrr,
  customer_count AS active_accounts,
  CASE
    WHEN prev_customer_count IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN customer_count - prev_customer_count > 0 THEN customer_count - prev_customer_count
    ELSE 0
  END AS accounts_added,
  CASE
    WHEN prev_customer_count IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN customer_count - prev_customer_count < 0 THEN ABS(customer_count - prev_customer_count)
    ELSE 0
  END AS accounts_lost,
  CASE
    WHEN prev_customer_count IS NULL THEN NULL
    ELSE customer_count - prev_customer_count
  END AS net_accounts
FROM latest
LIMIT 1;

revenue_report_12m.sql:
SELECT
  period_month,
  total_mrr AS total_revenue,
  customer_count AS active_accounts,
  CASE
    WHEN customer_count > 0 THEN total_mrr / customer_count
    ELSE NULL
  END AS arpu
FROM curated_core.mrr_monthly_rollup
ORDER BY period_month DESC
LIMIT 12;

passings_subscribers.sql:
WITH modeled AS (
  SELECT
    MAX(dt) AS dt,
    SUM(COALESCE(passings, 0)) AS total_passings,
    SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) AS total_subscriptions,
    SUM(COALESCE(mrr, 0)) AS total_mrr
  FROM curated_core.v_network_health
  WHERE dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM curated_core.v_network_health)
), investor AS (
  SELECT
    MAX(as_of_date) AS period_month,
    SUM(COALESCE(plat_id_count, 0)) AS total_billed_customers
  FROM curated_core.v_investor_revenue_mix_latest
)
SELECT
  modeled.dt,
  CAST(investor.period_month AS timestamp) AS period_month,
  modeled.total_passings,
  modeled.total_subscriptions,
  CASE
    WHEN modeled.total_passings > 0 THEN (modeled.total_subscriptions / modeled.total_passings) * 100
    ELSE NULL
  END AS penetration_pct,
  CASE
    WHEN modeled.total_subscriptions > 0 THEN modeled.total_mrr / modeled.total_subscriptions
    ELSE NULL
  END AS avg_arpu,
  modeled.total_mrr,
  investor.total_billed_customers
FROM modeled
CROSS JOIN investor
LIMIT 1;

ae_band_distribution.sql:
SELECT
  action_band,
  COUNT(*) AS customer_count,
  SUM(total_mrr) AS total_mrr
FROM curated_core.v_customer_fully_loaded_margin_banded
WHERE action_band IS NOT NULL
  AND total_mrr > 0
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
LIMIT 50;

at_risk_customers.sql:
SELECT
  b.customer_id,
  c.customer_name,
  b.action_band,
  b.fully_loaded_margin_pct,
  b.total_mrr
FROM curated_core.v_customer_fully_loaded_margin_banded b
LEFT JOIN curated_core.dim_customer_platt_v1_1 c
  ON c.customer_id = b.customer_id
WHERE b.action_band IN ('D_PRICE_PLUS_SIMPLIFY', 'E_EXIT_OR_RESCOPE')
ORDER BY b.fully_loaded_margin_pct ASC
LIMIT 500;

at_risk_count.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS at_risk_count
FROM curated_core.v_customer_fully_loaded_margin_banded
WHERE action_band IN ('D_PRICE_PLUS_SIMPLIFY', 'E_EXIT_OR_RESCOPE')
LIMIT 1;

ticket_burden_banded.sql:
SELECT
  ticket_burden_band,
  COUNT(*) AS customer_count,
  SUM(ticket_count_lake) AS total_tickets
FROM curated_core.v_ticket_burden_banded
GROUP BY ticket_burden_band
ORDER BY
  CASE ticket_burden_band
    WHEN '0' THEN 0
    WHEN '1-5' THEN 1
    WHEN '6-20' THEN 2
    WHEN '20+' THEN 3
    ELSE 4
  END;

ticket_burden_lake.sql:
SELECT customer_id, customer_name, ticket_count_lake
FROM curated_core.v_ticket_burden_lake
ORDER BY ticket_count_lake DESC
LIMIT 200;

ticket_trend_90d.sql:
SELECT
  CAST(DATE_TRUNC('day', TRY(from_iso8601_timestamp(created_time))) AS DATE) AS ticket_date,
  COUNT(*) AS ticket_count
FROM curated_core.v_cci_tickets_clean
WHERE created_time IS NOT NULL
  AND created_time <> ''
  AND TRY(from_iso8601_timestamp(created_time)) IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY CAST(DATE_TRUNC('day', TRY(from_iso8601_timestamp(created_time))) AS DATE)
ORDER BY ticket_date DESC
LIMIT 90;

raw_tickets_cci.sql:
SELECT
  st_number AS ticket_number,
  customer_name,
  customer_display_name,
  service_location_city,
  service_location_state,
  status,
  type,
  priority,
  service_area,
  operations_code,
  equipment_name,
  estimated_arrival_time,
  SUBSTR(work_done, 1, 200) AS work_done_preview,
  case_or_ticket_number,
  created_time
FROM curated_core.v_cci_tickets_clean
ORDER BY created_time DESC
LIMIT 500;

bucket_summary.sql:
SELECT
  bucket,
  fsa_count,
  customer_count,
  total_mrr,
  revenue_per_customer
FROM curated_core.v_bucket_summary_latest
ORDER BY CASE bucket WHEN 'owned_fttp' THEN 1 WHEN 'contracted_fttp' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END;

projects_pipeline.sql:
SELECT
  project_id,
  entity,
  project_name,
  project_type,
  state,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(stage, ''), 'Unknown') AS stage,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(priority, ''), 'Unranked') AS priority,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(owner, ''), 'Unassigned') AS owner,
  partner,
  split_pct,
  investment,
  npv,
  irr AS irr_pct,
  moic,
  notes
FROM curated_core.projects_enriched_live
WHERE project_id IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(CAST(project_id AS varchar)) <> ''
  AND LOWER(TRIM(CAST(project_id AS varchar))) <> 'nan'
ORDER BY entity, project_name
LIMIT 200;

projects_pipeline_defaults.sql:
SELECT
  approx_percentile(passings, 0.5) AS passings_p50,
  approx_percentile(months_to_completion, 0.5) AS build_months_p50,
  approx_percentile(arpu, 0.5) AS arpu_p50,
  approx_percentile(COALESCE(investment, construction_plus_install_cost), 0.5) AS total_capex_p50,
  approx_percentile(capex_per_passing, 0.5) AS capex_per_passing_p50,
  approx_percentile(install_cost_per_subscriber, 0.5) AS install_cost_per_subscriber_p50,
  approx_percentile(opex_per_sub, 0.5) AS opex_per_sub_p50
FROM curated_core.projects_enriched
WHERE passings > 0
  AND months_to_completion > 0
  AND arpu > 0;

projects_summary.sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS project_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT entity) AS entity_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT stage) AS stage_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT state) AS state_count
FROM curated_core.projects_enriched_live
WHERE project_id IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(CAST(project_id AS varchar)) <> ''
  AND LOWER(TRIM(CAST(project_id AS varchar))) <> 'nan'
LIMIT 1;

projects_pipeline_full.sql:
SELECT
  project_id,
  entity,
  project_name,
  project_type,
  state,
  stage,
  priority,
  owner,
  notes,
  partner,
  split_pct,
  investment,
  npv,
  irr,
  moic,
  passings,
  subscribers,
  take_rate,
  revenue,
  cash_flow,
  coc_return,
  construction_cost,
  construction_cost_per_passing,
  install_cost,
  install_cost_per_subscriber,
  construction_plus_install_cost,
  total_cost_per_passing,
  arpu,
  months_to_completion,
  contract_date,
  start_date,
  end_date,
  funnel_value,
  funnel_multiple,
  penetration_start_pct,
  penetration_target_pct,
  ramp_months,
  opex_per_sub,
  discount_rate_pct
FROM curated_core.projects_enriched_live
WHERE project_id IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(CAST(project_id AS varchar)) <> ''
  AND LOWER(TRIM(CAST(project_id AS varchar))) <> 'nan'
ORDER BY entity, project_name
LIMIT 500;

project_detail.sql:
SELECT
  entity,
  project_name,
  passings,
  months_to_completion AS build_months,
  COALESCE(investment, construction_plus_install_cost) AS total_capex,
  arpu AS arpu_start,
  penetration_start_pct,
  penetration_target_pct,
  ramp_months,
  COALESCE(capex_per_passing, total_cost_per_passing) AS capex_per_passing,
  opex_per_sub,
  opex_per_passing,
  subscription_months,
  subscription_rate,
  install_cost_per_subscriber,
  min_monthly_opex,
  cogs_pct_revenue,
  min_non_circuit_cogs,
  circuit,
  circuit_type,
  ebitda_multiple,
  discount_rate_pct
FROM curated_core.projects_enriched_live
WHERE project_id = ${project_id}
LIMIT 1;

glclosepack_discovery.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(business_date, TRY(date_parse(entry_date, '%m/%d/%Y'))) AS entry_dt
  FROM curated_core.intacct_gl_entries_current_ssot
  WHERE business_date IS NOT NULL OR entry_date IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT date_format(entry_dt, '%Y-%m') AS period_month
FROM base
WHERE entry_dt IS NOT NULL
  AND entry_dt >= date_add('month', -24, current_date)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1 DESC
LIMIT 36;

glclosepack_summary.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(business_date, TRY(date_parse(entry_date, '%m/%d/%Y'))) AS entry_dt,
    accountno,
    account_title,
    account_category,
    TRY_CAST(amount AS double) AS amount
  FROM curated_core.intacct_gl_entries_current_ssot
)
SELECT
  account_category,
  accountno,
  account_title,
  SUM(amount) AS amount_total
FROM base
WHERE entry_dt >= date_parse(concat(${period_month}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND entry_dt < date_add('month', 1, date_parse(concat(${period_month}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'))
  AND account_category IS NOT NULL
  AND (account_category LIKE 'Revenue%' OR account_category LIKE '%Revenue' OR account_category = 'Sales Returns and Discounts')
GROUP BY 1,2,3
ORDER BY 1,2
LIMIT ${limit};

glclosepack_detail.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(business_date, TRY(date_parse(entry_date, '%m/%d/%Y'))) AS entry_dt,
    accountno,
    account_title,
    account_category,
    customerid,
    customername,
    document,
    description,
    TRY_CAST(amount AS double) AS amount
  FROM curated_core.intacct_gl_entries_current_ssot
)
SELECT
  entry_dt,
  account_category,
  accountno,
  account_title,
  customerid,
  customername,
  amount,
  document,
  description
FROM base
WHERE entry_dt >= date_parse(concat(${period_month}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND entry_dt < date_add('month', 1, date_parse(concat(${period_month}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'))
  AND account_category IS NOT NULL
  AND (account_category LIKE 'Revenue%' OR account_category LIKE '%Revenue' OR account_category = 'Sales Returns and Discounts')
ORDER BY entry_dt DESC
LIMIT ${limit};

active_customers.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_customers
FROM curated_core.dim_customer_platt
WHERE has_active_service = true AND is_test_internal = false
LIMIT 1;

health_score_detail.sql:
SELECT
  action_band,
  COUNT(*) AS count,
  SUM(total_mrr) AS mrr
FROM curated_core.v_customer_fully_loaded_margin_banded
GROUP BY action_band
ORDER BY action_band
LIMIT 10;

hosted_pbx.sql:
SELECT *
FROM curated_core.v_hosted_pbx_migration
WHERE mrr_uplift_to_50 > 1000
ORDER BY mrr_uplift_to_50 DESC
LIMIT 200;

ticket_burden_customer.sql:
SELECT
  c.customer_id,
  c.customer_name,
  b.ticket_count_lake,
  b.ticket_burden_band
FROM curated_core.v_ticket_burden_banded b
LEFT JOIN curated_core.dim_customer_platt_v1_1 c
  ON c.customer_id = b.customer_id
ORDER BY b.ticket_count_lake DESC
LIMIT 200;

margin_tickets.sql:
SELECT
  customer_id,
  customer_name,
  total_mrr,
  total_cci_cost,
  gross_margin_dollars,
  gross_margin_pct,
  ticket_count_lake,
  ticket_burden_band,
  partner_pct,
  hosted_pbx_flag
FROM curated_core.v_customer_margin_plus_tickets
ORDER BY
  ticket_count_lake DESC,
  gross_margin_pct ASC
LIMIT 500;

network_health.sql:
WITH inv AS (
  SELECT MAX(as_of_date) AS period_month
  FROM curated_core.v_investor_revenue_mix_latest
)
SELECT
  nh.network,
  nh.network_norm,
  nh.network_type,
  nh.customer_type,
  nh.passings,
  nh.subscriptions,
  nh.subscriptions AS active_services,
  CAST(NULL AS double) AS billed_customers,
  CAST(NULL AS double) AS mrr_billed,
  nh.arpu,
  nh.arpu_label,
  nh.mrr,
  CAST(NULL AS double) AS arpu_billed,
  CAST(inv.period_month AS timestamp) AS period_month,
  nh.dt AS modeled_dt
FROM curated_core.v_network_health nh
CROSS JOIN inv
WHERE nh.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM curated_core.v_network_health)
  AND nh.network <> 'Unmapped'
LIMIT 2000;

network_network_type_summary.sql:
SELECT
  network_type,
  SUM(COALESCE(passings, 0)) AS passings,
  SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) AS subscriptions,
  CASE WHEN SUM(COALESCE(passings, 0)) > 0 THEN (SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) / SUM(COALESCE(passings, 0))) * 100 ELSE NULL END AS penetration_pct,
  CASE WHEN SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) > 0 THEN SUM(COALESCE(mrr, 0)) / SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) ELSE NULL END AS avg_arpu,
  SUM(COALESCE(mrr, 0)) AS total_mrr
FROM curated_core.v_network_health
WHERE dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM curated_core.v_network_health)
  AND network <> 'Unmapped'
GROUP BY network_type
ORDER BY passings DESC
LIMIT 200;

network_customer_type_summary.sql:
SELECT
  customer_type,
  SUM(COALESCE(passings, 0)) AS passings,
  SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) AS subscriptions,
  CASE WHEN SUM(COALESCE(passings, 0)) > 0 THEN (SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) / SUM(COALESCE(passings, 0))) * 100 ELSE NULL END AS penetration_pct,
  CASE WHEN SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) > 0 THEN SUM(COALESCE(mrr, 0)) / SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) ELSE NULL END AS avg_arpu,
  SUM(COALESCE(mrr, 0)) AS total_mrr
FROM curated_core.v_network_health
WHERE dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM curated_core.v_network_health)
  AND network <> 'Unmapped'
GROUP BY customer_type
ORDER BY passings DESC
LIMIT 200;

unmapped_network_services.sql: SELECT * FROM curated_recon.v_unmapped_network_services_latest ORDER BY active_services DESC;

freshness_mrr.sql:
SELECT
  MAX(period_month) AS latest_dt,
  COUNT(*) AS ssot_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN total_mrr < 0 THEN 1 END) AS exception_count
FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_and_churn_summary
WHERE period_month = (SELECT MAX(period_month) FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_and_churn_summary)
LIMIT 1;

freshness_projects.sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS ssot_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN project_id IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS exception_count
FROM curated_core.projects_enriched
LIMIT 1;

freshness_tickets.sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS ssot_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN customer_account_number IS NULL OR customer_account_number = '' THEN 1 END) AS exception_count
FROM curated_core.v_cci_tickets_clean
LIMIT 1;

account_churn_rate.sql:
SELECT
  period_month,
  SUM(accounts_lost) AS accounts_lost,
  SUM(active_accounts_proxy) AS active_accounts_proxy
FROM curated_core.v_monthly_account_churn_by_segment
WHERE period_month = (SELECT MAX(period_month) FROM curated_core.v_monthly_account_churn_by_segment)
GROUP BY period_month
LIMIT 1;

mrr_fy2025_kpi.sql:
WITH monthly AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(date_trunc('month', period_month) AS date) AS period_month,
    SUM(COALESCE(mrr_total, 0)) AS total_mrr
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  SUM(total_mrr) AS fy2025_mrr_total
FROM monthly
WHERE period_month >= DATE '2025-01-01'
  AND period_month < DATE '2026-01-01'
LIMIT 1;

mrr_fy2025_monthly.sql:
WITH monthly AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(date_trunc('month', period_month) AS date) AS period_month,
    SUM(COALESCE(mrr_total, 0)) AS total_mrr
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  substr(CAST(period_month AS varchar), 1, 7) AS period_month,
  total_mrr
FROM monthly
WHERE period_month >= DATE '2025-01-01'
  AND period_month < DATE '2026-01-01'
ORDER BY 1
LIMIT 50;

mrr_fy2025_top_customers.sql:
WITH customer_month AS (
  SELECT
    period_month,
    customer_id,
    customer_name,
    SUM(mrr_total) AS mrr_total_customer_month
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
  WHERE substr(CAST(period_month AS varchar), 1, 7) >= '2025-01'
    AND substr(CAST(period_month AS varchar), 1, 7) <= '2025-12'
  GROUP BY 1,2,3
)
SELECT
  customer_id,
  customer_name,
  SUM(mrr_total_customer_month) AS fy2025_mrr_total
FROM customer_month
GROUP BY 1,2
ORDER BY 3 DESC
LIMIT 25;

executive_strip_mrr.sql:
SELECT
  SUM(mrr_total) AS total_mrr,
  COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS customer_count,
  MAX(period_month) AS period_month
FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
WHERE period_month = (SELECT MAX(period_month) FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt)
  AND mrr_total > 0
LIMIT 1;

executive_strip_churn.sql:
SELECT period_month, ending_mrr, mrr_churn
FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_and_churn_summary
ORDER BY period_month DESC
LIMIT 2;

mrr_trajectory.sql:
SELECT period_month, ending_mrr
FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_and_churn_summary
ORDER BY period_month DESC
LIMIT 24;

revenue_quality.sql:
SELECT
  action_band,
  COUNT(*) AS customer_count,
  SUM(total_mrr) AS total_mrr
FROM curated_core.v_customer_fully_loaded_margin_banded
WHERE total_mrr > 0
GROUP BY action_band
ORDER BY action_band;

ops_health.sql:
SELECT
  (SELECT SUM(ticket_count_lake) FROM curated_core.v_ticket_burden_lake) AS total_tickets,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id)
     FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
     WHERE period_month = (SELECT MAX(period_month) FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt)
       AND mrr_total > 0
  ) AS active_customers;

network_map_points.sql:
SELECT
  service_location_id,
  latitude,
  longitude,
  broadband_status,
  build,
  plan_id
FROM curated_core.v_vetro_service_locations
LIMIT 100;

network_map_counts.sql:
WITH plan_cte AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT plan_id) AS plan_count
  FROM curated_core.v_vetro_network_map_layers_v1
  WHERE plan_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(CAST(plan_id AS varchar)) <> ''
), sl_cte AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT service_location_id) AS service_locations_unique,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN build = 'Yes' THEN service_location_id END) AS build_yes_unique
  FROM curated_core.v_vetro_service_locations_tbl
)
SELECT
  plan_cte.plan_count,
  sl_cte.service_locations_unique,
  sl_cte.build_yes_unique
FROM plan_cte
CROSS JOIN sl_cte;

gis_service_locations.sql:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT
    layer_key,
    entity_id,
    latitude,
    longitude,
    icon_key,
    color_hex,
    city,
    state,
    build,
    broadband_status,
    network_status,
    bsl_id,
    plan_id,
    network,
    network_source,
    as_built,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY entity_id
      ORDER BY as_built DESC, network_source DESC, network DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM curated_core.v_vetro_network_map_layers_v1
  WHERE layer_key = 'service_locations'
)
SELECT
  layer_key,
  entity_id,
  latitude,
  longitude,
  icon_key,
  color_hex,
  city,
  state,
  build,
  broadband_status,
  network_status,
  bsl_id,
  plan_id,
  network,
  network_source,
  as_built
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
LIMIT 25000;

gis_service_locations_by_network.sql:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT
    layer_key,
    entity_id,
    latitude,
    longitude,
    icon_key,
    color_hex,
    city,
    state,
    build,
    broadband_status,
    network_status,
    bsl_id,
    plan_id,
    network,
    network_source,
    as_built,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY entity_id
      ORDER BY as_built DESC, network_source DESC, network DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM curated_core.v_vetro_network_map_layers_v1
  WHERE layer_key = 'service_locations'
    AND network = ${network}
)
SELECT
  layer_key,
  entity_id,
  latitude,
  longitude,
  icon_key,
  color_hex,
  city,
  state,
  build,
  broadband_status,
  network_status,
  bsl_id,
  plan_id,
  network,
  network_source,
  as_built
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
LIMIT 25000;

gis_network_list.sql:
SELECT
  network,
  COUNT(DISTINCT entity_id) AS service_location_count
FROM curated_core.v_vetro_network_map_layers_v1
WHERE layer_key = 'service_locations'
  AND network IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(CAST(network AS varchar)) <> ''
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY service_location_count DESC, network
LIMIT 200;

gis_fiber_aerial.sql: SELECT * FROM curated_core.v_vetro_map_lines_layers_v1 WHERE layer_key = 'fiber_aerial' LIMIT 25000;

gis_fiber_underground.sql: SELECT * FROM curated_core.v_vetro_map_lines_layers_v1 WHERE layer_key = 'fiber_underground' LIMIT 25000;

gis_fiber_mixed.sql: SELECT * FROM curated_core.v_vetro_map_lines_layers_v1 WHERE layer_key = 'fiber_mixed' LIMIT 25000;

gis_fiber_unknown.sql: SELECT * FROM curated_core.v_vetro_map_lines_layers_v1 WHERE layer_key = 'fiber_unknown' LIMIT 25000;

gis_fiber_owner_gwi.sql: SELECT * FROM curated_core.v_vetro_map_lines_owner_v1 WHERE layer_key = 'fiber_owner_gwi' LIMIT 25000;

gis_fiber_owner_lymefiber.sql: SELECT * FROM curated_core.v_vetro_map_lines_owner_v1 WHERE layer_key = 'fiber_owner_lymefiber' LIMIT 25000;

unique_customer_ids.sql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS period_month
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
)
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(m.mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN m.customer_id END) AS active_billing_customers,
  MAX(l.period_month) AS period_month
FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt m
CROSS JOIN latest l
WHERE m.period_month = l.period_month
LIMIT 1;

customers_in_city.sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT username) AS customer_count,
  ${city} AS city
FROM curated_core.platt_customer_current_ssot
WHERE username IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(username) <> ''
  AND (
    LOWER(city) = LOWER(${city})
    OR LOWER(gwi_lq_city) = LOWER(${city})
  )
  AND LOWER(COALESCE(active, '')) IN ('y','yes','true','1')
  AND LOWER(COALESCE(sensitive_p, '')) <> 'y'
LIMIT 1;

customers_in_city_breakdown.sql:
SELECT
  ${city} AS city,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN username IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(username) <> '' THEN username END) AS total_customers,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(active, '')) IN ('y','yes','true','1') AND username IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(username) <> '' THEN username END) AS active_customers,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(active, '')) NOT IN ('y','yes','true','1') AND username IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(username) <> '' THEN username END) AS inactive_customers
FROM curated_core.platt_customer_current_ssot
WHERE (
    LOWER(city) = LOWER(${city})
    OR LOWER(gwi_lq_city) = LOWER(${city})
  )
  AND LOWER(COALESCE(sensitive_p, '')) <> 'y'
LIMIT 1;

copper_customers_count.sql:
WITH modeled AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) AS copper_active_services,
    SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) AS copper_subscriptions,
    SUM(COALESCE(mrr, 0)) AS copper_mrr_modeled,
    MAX(dt) AS modeled_dt
  FROM curated_core.v_network_health
  WHERE dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM curated_core.v_network_health)
    AND (
      LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) LIKE '%copper%'
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network_norm, '')) LIKE '%copper%'
    )
    AND (
      ${network} = ''
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) = LOWER(${network})
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) LIKE LOWER(${network_prefix})
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network_norm, '')) = LOWER(${network})
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network_norm, '')) LIKE LOWER(${network_prefix})
    )
), billing AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(COALESCE(plat_id_count, 0)) AS copper_customer_count,
    SUM(COALESCE(revenue, 0)) AS copper_mrr_billed,
    MAX(as_of_date) AS period_month
  FROM curated_core.v_investor_revenue_mix_latest
  WHERE (
      LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) LIKE '%copper%'
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network_type, '')) LIKE '%copper%'
    )
    AND (
      ${network} = ''
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) = LOWER(${network})
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) LIKE LOWER(${network_prefix})
    )
)
SELECT
  billing.copper_customer_count,
  modeled.copper_active_services,
  modeled.copper_subscriptions,
  COALESCE(billing.copper_mrr_billed, modeled.copper_mrr_modeled) AS copper_mrr_billed,
  COALESCE(CAST(billing.period_month AS timestamp), CAST(modeled.modeled_dt AS timestamp)) AS period_month
FROM billing
CROSS JOIN modeled
LIMIT 1;

copper_customers_network_mix.sql:
WITH modeled AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) AS copper_active_services,
    SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) AS copper_subscriptions,
    SUM(COALESCE(mrr, 0)) AS copper_mrr_modeled,
    MAX(dt) AS modeled_dt
  FROM curated_core.v_network_health
  WHERE dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM curated_core.v_network_health)
    AND (
      LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) LIKE '%copper%'
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network_norm, '')) LIKE '%copper%'
    )
    AND (
      ${network} = ''
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) = LOWER(${network})
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) LIKE LOWER(${network_prefix})
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network_norm, '')) = LOWER(${network})
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network_norm, '')) LIKE LOWER(${network_prefix})
    )
), billing AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(COALESCE(plat_id_count, 0)) AS copper_billed_customers,
    SUM(COALESCE(revenue, 0)) AS copper_mrr_billed,
    MAX(as_of_date) AS period_month
  FROM curated_core.v_investor_revenue_mix_latest
  WHERE (
      LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) LIKE '%copper%'
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network_type, '')) LIKE '%copper%'
    )
    AND (
      ${network} = ''
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) = LOWER(${network})
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) LIKE LOWER(${network_prefix})
    )
)
SELECT
  billing.copper_billed_customers,
  modeled.copper_active_services,
  modeled.copper_subscriptions,
  COALESCE(billing.copper_mrr_billed, modeled.copper_mrr_modeled) AS copper_mrr_billed,
  COALESCE(CAST(billing.period_month AS timestamp), CAST(modeled.modeled_dt AS timestamp)) AS period_month
FROM billing
CROSS JOIN modeled
LIMIT 1;

open_tickets_active.sql:
SELECT
  case_or_ticket_number AS ticket_number,
  customer_name,
  customer_display_name,
  service_location_city,
  service_location_state,
  status,
  type,
  priority,
  service_area,
  operations_code,
  equipment_name,
  created_time
FROM curated_core.v_cci_tickets_clean
WHERE status IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(status) <> ''
  AND LOWER(status) NOT IN ('closed', 'resolved', 'complete', 'completed', 'done')
  AND LOWER(status) NOT LIKE '%closed%'
  AND LOWER(status) NOT LIKE '%resolved%'
ORDER BY created_time DESC
LIMIT 500;

outages_reported.sql:
SELECT
  case_or_ticket_number AS ticket_number,
  customer_name,
  customer_display_name,
  service_location_city,
  service_location_state,
  status,
  type,
  priority,
  service_area,
  operations_code,
  equipment_name,
  created_time,
  SUBSTR(work_done, 1, 200) AS work_done_preview
FROM curated_core.v_cci_tickets_clean
WHERE (
  LOWER(type) LIKE '%outage%'
  OR LOWER(work_done) LIKE '%outage%'
  OR LOWER(operations_code) LIKE '%outage%'
)
ORDER BY created_time DESC
LIMIT 500;

plat_id_count_by_network_latest.sql:
SELECT
  network,
  network_type,
  as_of_date,
  plat_id_count
FROM curated_core.v_investor_revenue_mix_latest
WHERE LOWER(network) = LOWER(${network})
LIMIT 1;

platt_billing_customers_by_system_latest.sql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS period_month
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
), billing AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(customer_id AS varchar) AS customer_id,
    period_month,
    mrr_total
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
  WHERE period_month = (SELECT period_month FROM latest)
), system_map AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN pm.customer_id LIKE '%.0' THEN substr(pm.customer_id, 1, length(pm.customer_id) - 2)
        ELSE pm.customer_id
      END
      AS varchar
    ) AS customer_id,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(pm.gwi_system), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(pc.gwi_system), '')) AS gwi_system
  FROM curated_recon.platt_customer_system_map pm
  LEFT JOIN curated_core.platt_customer_current_ssot pc
    ON CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN pm.customer_id LIKE '%.0' THEN substr(pm.customer_id, 1, length(pm.customer_id) - 2)
        ELSE pm.customer_id
      END
      AS varchar
    ) = CAST(pc.id AS varchar)
)
SELECT
  sm.gwi_system,
  MAX(b.period_month) AS invoice_month,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(b.mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN b.customer_id END) AS plat_id_count
FROM billing b
JOIN system_map sm
  ON b.customer_id = sm.customer_id
WHERE sm.gwi_system IS NOT NULL
  AND LOWER(TRIM(sm.gwi_system)) = LOWER(TRIM(${gwi_system}))
GROUP BY 1
LIMIT 1;

platt_billing_customers_by_system_month.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    customer AS customer_id,
    substr(date,1,7) AS invoice_month_str,
    try_cast(total AS double) AS total
  FROM raw_platt.iheader_raw
  WHERE dt = (SELECT max(dt) FROM raw_platt.iheader_raw)
), filtered AS (
  SELECT
    customer_id,
    date_parse(concat(invoice_month_str, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AS invoice_month,
    total
  FROM base
  WHERE invoice_month_str IS NOT NULL AND length(invoice_month_str) = 7
), customers AS (
  SELECT id AS customer_id, gwi_system
  FROM raw_platt.customer
  WHERE dt = (SELECT max(dt) FROM raw_platt.customer)
)
SELECT
  c.gwi_system,
  f.invoice_month,
  COUNT(DISTINCT f.customer_id) AS plat_id_count
FROM filtered f
JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id = f.customer_id
WHERE f.total <> 0
  AND LOWER(TRIM(c.gwi_system)) = LOWER(TRIM(${gwi_system}))
  AND f.invoice_month = DATE ${invoice_month}
GROUP BY 1,2
LIMIT 1;

billing_customers_in_network_latest.sql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS period_month
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
), billing AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(customer_id AS varchar) AS customer_id,
    mrr_total
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
  WHERE period_month = (SELECT period_month FROM latest)
), system_map AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN pm.customer_id LIKE '%.0' THEN substr(pm.customer_id, 1, length(pm.customer_id) - 2)
        ELSE pm.customer_id
      END
      AS varchar
    ) AS customer_id,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(pm.gwi_system), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(pc.gwi_system), '')) AS gwi_system,
    trim(regexp_replace(
      lower(coalesce(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(pm.gwi_system), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(pc.gwi_system), '')), '')),
      '[^a-z0-9]+',
      ' '
    )) AS gwi_system_norm
  FROM curated_recon.platt_customer_system_map pm
  LEFT JOIN curated_core.platt_customer_current_ssot pc
    ON CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN pm.customer_id LIKE '%.0' THEN substr(pm.customer_id, 1, length(pm.customer_id) - 2)
        ELSE pm.customer_id
      END
      AS varchar
    ) = CAST(pc.id AS varchar)
), network_map AS (
  SELECT
    trim(regexp_replace(lower(coalesce(gwi_system_norm, '')), ' +', ' ')) AS gwi_system_norm,
    network
  FROM curated_recon.gwi_system_network_map
), mapped_billing AS (
  SELECT
    nm.network,
    b.customer_id,
    b.mrr_total
  FROM billing b
  LEFT JOIN system_map sm
    ON b.customer_id = sm.customer_id
  LEFT JOIN network_map nm
    ON trim(regexp_replace(sm.gwi_system_norm, ' +', ' ')) = nm.gwi_system_norm
), billing_rollup AS (
  SELECT
    network,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN customer_id END) AS billed_customers,
    SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(mrr_total, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS billed_mrr
  FROM mapped_billing
  WHERE network IS NOT NULL
    AND LOWER(network) = LOWER(${network})
  GROUP BY 1
), modeled AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) AS modeled_subscriptions,
    SUM(COALESCE(mrr, 0)) AS modeled_mrr
  FROM curated_core.v_network_health
  WHERE dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM curated_core.v_network_health)
    AND (
      LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) = LOWER(${network})
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network_norm, '')) = LOWER(${network})
    )
)
SELECT
  br.network,
  CAST((SELECT period_month FROM latest) AS timestamp) AS invoice_month,
  br.billed_customers,
  br.billed_mrr,
  modeled.modeled_subscriptions,
  modeled.modeled_mrr,
  (br.billed_mrr - modeled.modeled_mrr) AS mrr_delta,
  CASE
    WHEN modeled.modeled_mrr IS NULL OR modeled.modeled_mrr = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE br.billed_mrr / modeled.modeled_mrr
  END AS billed_to_modeled_ratio
FROM billing_rollup br
CROSS JOIN modeled
LIMIT 1;

vetro_network_status_dominant.sql:
WITH counts AS (
  SELECT
    network,
    network_status,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM curated_core.v_vetro_network_map_layers_v1
  WHERE layer_key = 'service_locations'
    AND network IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(network) <> ''
    AND network_status IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(network_status) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1, 2
), totals AS (
  SELECT network, SUM(n) AS total_n
  FROM counts
  GROUP BY 1
), ranked AS (
  SELECT
    c.network,
    c.network_status,
    c.n,
    t.total_n,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.network ORDER BY c.n DESC, c.network_status) AS rn
  FROM counts c
  JOIN totals t
    ON c.network = t.network
)
SELECT
  network,
  network_status AS dominant_status,
  n AS dominant_rows,
  total_n AS total_rows,
  CAST(100.0 * n / NULLIF(total_n, 0) AS double) AS dominant_pct
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY dominant_pct DESC, dominant_rows DESC;

vetro_networks_in_construction.sql:
WITH counts AS (
  SELECT
    network,
    network_status,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM curated_core.v_vetro_network_map_layers_v1
  WHERE layer_key = 'service_locations'
    AND network IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(network) <> ''
    AND network_status IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(network_status) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1, 2
), totals AS (
  SELECT network, SUM(n) AS total_n
  FROM counts
  GROUP BY 1
), ranked AS (
  SELECT
    c.network,
    c.network_status,
    c.n,
    t.total_n,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.network ORDER BY c.n DESC, c.network_status) AS rn
  FROM counts c
  JOIN totals t
    ON c.network = t.network
)
SELECT
  network,
  network_status AS dominant_status,
  n AS dominant_rows,
  total_n AS total_rows,
  CAST(100.0 * n / NULLIF(total_n, 0) AS double) AS dominant_pct
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
  AND network_status IN ('Planned', 'Design Complete', 'Installed')
ORDER BY dominant_pct DESC, dominant_rows DESC;
